summary: Complete audit of the POV writing prompt as actually sent to AI (991 lines). Found 10 redundancies (~105 wasted lines), 5 conflicts (word count being the worst — style JSON says 100-200 in 5 places while user sets 150-650), and 4 structural issues. Proposes clear fix: style JSON owns all style rules, prompt owns only unique content rules, style JSON word count hardcodes removed.
